analysisResult.goal: Help users plan memorable trips by discovering destinations, building itineraries, booking accommodation, and tracking budgets all in one place.

features.name: Search Destinations
features.description: Users search for destinations by keyword and receive ranked results.

features.name: Apply Filters
features.description: Filter destinations by climate type, budget range, and travel tags.

features.name: View Destination Detail
features.description: Tap a destination to see full info, weather forecast, and traveler reviews.

features.name: Save to Wishlist
features.description: Bookmark destinations to a personal wishlist for future trip planning.

features.name: Build Itinerary
features.description: Create a day-by-day activity plan with custom activities per day.

features.name: Hotel Search & Booking
features.description: Search available hotels and complete reservations within the app.

features.name: Budget Tracker
features.description: Track estimated vs actual spending with category-level breakdown.

features.name: Share Trip Plan
features.description: Share the finalized itinerary with companions via link or PDF export.

data.title: Load Destination Discovery
data.description: Initialize destination discovery with nearby destinations and user location

config.functionCode: return { destinations: [{"id": "dest-001", "name": "Kyoto, Japan", "country": "Japan", "rating": 4.8, "avgCost": 2500, "climate": "temperate", "tags": ["culture", "temples", "food"]}, {"id": "dest-002", "name": "Barcelona, Spain", "country": "Spain", "rating": 4.7, "avgCost": 2000, "climate": "mediterranean", "tags": ["beach", "art", "nightlife"]}, {"id": "dest-003", "name": "Queenstown, NZ", "country": "New Zealand", "rating": 4.9, "avgCost": 3200, "climate": "temperate", "tags": ["adventure", "nature", "skiing"]}], userLocation: { lat: 37.5665, lng: 126.9780 } };

prdReference.rationale: Loads nearby destinations based on user GPS location

data.title: Apply Climate Filter
data.description: Filter destinations by selected climate types

config.functionCode: const filtered = inputData.destinations.filter(d => inputData.climateFilter.includes(d.climate)); return { filteredByClimate: filtered, activeFilters: inputData.climateFilter };

prdReference.rationale: Lets users narrow destinations by preferred climate

data.title: Apply Budget Filter
data.description: Filter results within user's maximum budget per trip

config.functionCode: const filtered = inputData.filteredByClimate.filter(d => d.avgCost <= inputData.maxBudget); return { filteredByBudget: filtered, maxBudget: inputData.maxBudget };

prdReference.rationale: Ensures destinations displayed are within the user's budget range

data.title: Start

data.title: Load Trip Planning
data.description: Initialize trip planning with itinerary and hotel data

config.functionCode: return { itinerary: [{"day": 1, "date": "2026-04-10", "activities": ["Arrive Kyoto", "Check-in hotel", "Gion district walk"], "budget": 200}, {"day": 2, "date": "2026-04-11", "activities": ["Fushimi Inari hike", "Nishiki Market lunch", "Tea ceremony"], "budget": 150}, {"day": 3, "date": "2026-04-12", "activities": ["Arashiyama bamboo grove", "Kinkakuji temple", "Farewell dinner"], "budget": 180}], tripId: 'trip-001', destination: {"id": "dest-001", "name": "Kyoto, Japan", "country": "Japan", "rating": 4.8, "avgCost": 2500, "climate": "temperate", "tags": ["culture", "temples", "food"]} };

prdReference.rationale: Loads all trip data needed for the planning interface

data.title: Build Itinerary
data.description: Create and manage a day-by-day activity plan for the trip

data.title: Add Itinerary Day
data.description: Insert a new day slot into the trip itinerary

config.functionCode: const newDay = { day: inputData.itinerary.length + 1, date: inputData.newDate, activities: [], budget: 0 }; return { updatedItinerary: [...inputData.itinerary, newDay], newDay, dayCount: inputData.itinerary.length + 1 };

prdReference.rationale: Allows users to extend trip duration by adding new day slots

testCases.name: Success case

testCases.description: Error handling in Add Itinerary Day

testCases.name: Edge case
testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Add Itinerary Day

data.title: Schedule Activity
data.description: Add a travel activity to a specific itinerary day

config.functionCode: const updated = inputData.itinerary.map((d, i) => i === inputData.dayIndex ? { ...d, activities: [...d.activities, inputData.activity] } : d); return { scheduledActivity: inputData.activity, dayIndex: inputData.dayIndex, itinerary: updated };

prdReference.rationale: Lets users build a day-by-day activity plan for their trip

testCases.description: Valid execution of Schedule Activity

data.title: Compare Hotels
data.description: Rank hotels by value score (stars/price ratio)

config.functionCode: const ranked = inputData.hotels.filter(h => h.available).sort((a, b) => (b.stars / b.pricePerNight) - (a.stars / a.pricePerNight)); const prices = ranked.map(h => h.pricePerNight); return { rankedHotels: ranked, bestValue: ranked[0], priceRange: { min: Math.min(...prices), max: Math.max(...prices) } };

prdReference.rationale: Helps users choose the best value accommodation for their budget

testCases.description: Valid execution of Compare Hotels

testCases.description: Error handling in Compare Hotels

data.title: Budget Tracker
data.description: Track trip budget with cost estimates and real-time expense logging

data.title: Calculate Trip Budget
data.description: Sum hotel costs and estimated activity costs for the trip

config.functionCode: const activityBudget = inputData.itinerary.reduce((sum, d) => sum + d.budget, 0); const total = inputData.hotelCost + activityBudget; return { totalBudget: total, hotelCost: inputData.hotelCost, activitiesBudget: activityBudget, remainingBudget: total - inputData.hotelCost };

prdReference.rationale: Gives users a clear picture of their estimated trip costs

testCases.name: Success case
testCases.description: Valid execution of Calculate Trip Budget

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Calculate Trip Budget

testCases.name: Edge case
testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Calculate Trip Budget

data.title: Add Expense Entry
data.description: Record a new expense to the trip budget log

config.functionCode: const newExpense = { category: inputData.category, amount: inputData.amount, date: inputData.date }; const all = [...inputData.existingExpenses, newExpense]; return { expenses: all, totalSpent: all.reduce((s, e) => s + e.amount, 0) };

prdReference.rationale: Lets users track actual spending during the trip against budget

testCases.name: Success case
testCases.description: Valid execution of Add Expense Entry

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Add Expense Entry

testCases.name: Edge case
testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Add Expense Entry

data.title: Budget Summary View
data.description: Display budget overview with spent vs remaining breakdown

config.functionCode: const spent = inputData.hotelCost + inputData.totalSpent; return { budgetSummary: { total: inputData.totalBudget, spent, remaining: inputData.totalBudget - spent, onTrack: spent <= inputData.totalBudget }, categoryBreakdown: { hotel: inputData.hotelCost, activities: 530, expenses: inputData.totalSpent } };

prdReference.rationale: Provides a visual overview of budget utilization during the trip

testCases.name: Success case
testCases.description: Valid execution of Budget Summary View

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Budget Summary View

testCases.name: Edge case
testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Budget Summary View

config.functionCode: return inputData;

prdReference.rationale: Helps users stay within budget by tracking planned vs actual costs

data.description: Sum hotel costs and estimated activity costs for the trip

config.functionCode: const activityBudget = inputData.itinerary.reduce((sum, d) => sum + d.budget, 0); const total = inputData.hotelCost + activityBudget; return { totalBudget: total, hotelCost: inputData.hotelCost, activitiesBudget: activityBudget, remainingBudget: total - inputData.hotelCost };

prdReference.rationale: Gives users a clear picture of their estimated trip costs

data.title: Add Expense Entry
data.description: Record a new expense to the trip budget log

config.functionCode: const newExpense = { category: inputData.category, amount: inputData.amount, date: inputData.date }; const all = [...inputData.existingExpenses, newExpense]; return { expenses: all, totalSpent: all.reduce((s, e) => s + e.amount, 0) };

prdReference.rationale: Lets users track actual spending during the trip against budget

testCases.name: Success case
testCases.description: Valid execution of Add Expense Entry

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Add Expense Entry

testCases.name: Edge case
testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Add Expense Entry

data.title: Budget Summary View
data.description: Display budget overview with spent vs remaining breakdown

config.functionCode: const spent = inputData.hotelCost + inputData.totalSpent; return { budgetSummary: { total: inputData.totalBudget, spent, remaining: inputData.totalBudget - spent, onTrack: spent <= inputData.totalBudget }, categoryBreakdown: { hotel: inputData.hotelCost, activities: 530, expenses: inputData.totalSpent } };

prdReference.rationale: Provides a visual overview of budget utilization during the trip

data.title: Share Trip Plan
data.description: Share the finalized trip plan with travel companions via link or PDF

data.title: Generate Share Link
data.description: Create a shareable read-only link for the trip plan

config.functionCode: return { shareLink: `https://app.travel/trips/${inputData.tripId}/shared`, expiresAt: new Date(Date.now() + 30*24*60*60*1000).toISOString(), accessLevel: 'view' };

prdReference.rationale: Enables users to share their itinerary with travel companions or friends

data.title: Export as PDF
data.description: Generate a printable PDF summary of the complete trip plan

config.functionCode: return { pdfUrl: `https://app.travel/trips/${inputData.tripId}/export.pdf`, generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), pageCount: inputData.itinerary.length };

prdReference.rationale: Provides an offline-accessible version of the trip plan
